name: @fiducia/sync
description: Local-first sync SDK for fiducia.cloud — an optimistic IndexedDB store reconciled with Postgres over Supabase realtime + the backend WS, powered by the fiducia-sync-core WASM.

scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg -- --features wasm
scripts.build:wasm-web: cd .. && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-web -- --features wasm
scripts.build:admin-bundle: npm run build:wasm-web && esbuild admin/entry.mjs --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --loader:.wasm=binary --outfile=admin/dist/fiducia-sync-admin.js && cp admin/dist/fiducia-sync-admin.js ../../fiducia-admin.rs/assets/fiducia-sync.js
